name: Initialize New Project
on: [push]

jobs:
  setup:
    # Only run on the very first push and NOT on the template repo itself
    if: github.run_number == 1 && github.repository != 'Anjumoze/Template_Application'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3

      - name: Rename Project in Files
        run: |
          REPO_NAME=$(echo "${{ github.repository }}" | cut -d'/' -f2)
          # Update package.json
          sed -i "s/\"name\": \"template-application\"/\"name\": \"$REPO_NAME\"/g" package.json
          # Update angular.json (crucial for Angular apps)
          sed -i "s/template-application/$REPO_NAME/g" angular.json
          
      - name: Commit and Push Changes
        run: |
          git config --local user.email "action@github.com"
          git config --local user.name "GitHub Action"
          git add .
          git commit -m "chore: auto-rename project to $REPO_NAME"
          git push
